figures.caption: Fig. 1: End-to-end AgentSOC workflow shows the continuous Sense-Reason-Act cycle. Alerts flow through Perception, Agentic Reasoning, and Action layers. The Internal Knowledge Store provides enterprise context, and Real-Time Monitoring enables closed-loop feedback.
Fig. 2: Processing time breakdown across AgentSOC pipeline stages demonstrating sub-second latency (506 ms total).
